settings.name: Language
settings.description: Language for Opal's menus and overlays. Change it any time; the client re-applies without a restart.

groups.title: Graphics
groups.description: Quality tiers for the Liquid Glass renderer and post-processing.
groups.note: Blur and Bloom are edited from the in-game Post Processing panel. The per-effect quality settings inherit from Glass Quality unless you override them.

settings.name: Fresnel Quality
settings.description: Quality of the Fresnel rim-light on glass surfaces. OFF skips the shader entirely.

settings.name: Glass Quality
settings.description: Master quality for every Liquid Glass effect. The overrides below cascade from this.

settings.name: Blur Quality
settings.description: Per-effect blur override. INHERIT follows Glass Quality.

settings.name: Refraction Quality
settings.description: Per-effect refraction override. INHERIT follows Glass Quality.

settings.name: Shadow Quality
settings.description: Per-effect shadow override. INHERIT follows Glass Quality.

settings.name: Liquid Glass Quality
settings.description: Per-effect liquid-glass override. INHERIT follows Glass Quality.

groups.title: Interface
groups.description: The main menu and how big the UI draws.

settings.name: Custom Main Menu
settings.description: Replace the vanilla title screen with Opal's own. Applies the next time the title screen opens.

settings.name: Menu Shaders
settings.description: Animated shader background behind the Opal main menu.

settings.name: Alt Manager Scale
settings.description: UI scale for the Alt Manager.

settings.name: UI Scale
settings.description: Global scale for Opal's HUD and menus, on top of the resolution-aware auto scale.

groups.title: Chat
groups.description: Quality-of-life tweaks for the chat box.

settings.name: Chat Selection
settings.description: Drag to select chat text. Ctrl+C copies; Shift or Ctrl+Shift with the arrow keys extends the selection.

settings.name: Screenshot in Chat
settings.description: Turn the screenshot-saved message into a Copy / Open / Delete line.

settings.name: Clickable Links
settings.description: Make http and https links in chat clickable. Opening one always shows a safety prompt first.

groups.title: Integrations
groups.description: What Opal shares with our services.

settings.name: Opt out of hardware survey
settings.description: Stop sending the anonymous, bucketed hardware snapshot (GPU, CPU, OS, RAM). No serials, IP addresses, or file paths are ever collected.
